zh.St Leonard Eastcheap, London, England: 英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 貝尼特 格拉其 煙雨 聖 倫納德 易亞斯亞普
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Brooke於大約1531年出生在英國倫敦時，他的父親Robert Brooke38歲，母親Mrs. Katheryn Brooke33歲。他於1554年5月8日與Elizabeth Whetman在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 貝尼特 格拉其 煙雨 聖 倫納德 易亞斯亞普結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1584年7月8日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦雷迪其。

zh-hans.St Leonard Eastcheap, London, England: 英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 貝尼特 格拉其 煙雨 聖 倫納德 易亞斯亞普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Brooke于大约1531年出生在英国倫敦时，他的父亲Robert Brooke38岁，母亲Mrs. Katheryn Brooke33岁。他于1554年5月8日与Elizabeth Whetman在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 貝尼特 格拉其 煙雨 聖 倫納德 易亞斯亞普结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1584年7月8日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦雷迪其。

nameMeanings.name: Brooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Brook  , which preserves a trace of the Old English dative singular case, originally used after a preposition (e.g. ‘at the brook’).

History: In 1650, Robert and Mary Mainwaring Brooke brought ten children and a number of servants with them from England to MD, where Robert became governor. Although the fourteen known contemporary Brooke immigrants in VA included Robert's brothers Richard and Humphrey, the relationships of the others are unknown. Brooke family memorials remain in the Anglican church at Whitchurch, Hampshire, England.

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Brooke was born about 1531, in London, England, his father, Robert Brooke, was 38 and his mother, Mrs. Katheryn Brooke, was 33. He married Elizabeth Whetman on 8 May 1554, in London St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eastcheap, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died before 8 July 1584, in his hometown, and was buried in Shoreditch, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Brooke est né environ 1531, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, Robert Brooke, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Katheryn Brooke, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Whetman le 8 mai 1554, à London St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eastcheap, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé avant 8 juillet 1584, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Shoreditch, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.St Leonard Eastcheap, London, England: イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ベンエット グレイセチャーチ ウィス スト レオナルド エアストチェアップ
ja.lifeSummary: John Brookeが約1531年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Robert Brookeは38歳，母Mrs. Katheryn Brookeは33歳であった。1554年5月8日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ベンエット グレイセチャーチ ウィス スト レオナルド エアストチェアップでElizabeth Whetmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1584年7月8日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンショアディトチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Leonard Eastcheap, London, England: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 베넷 그라스c후르치 위스 스트 리나르드 이스트체아프
ko.lifeSummary: John Brooke(이)가 대략 1531년 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Brooke(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Katheryn Brooke(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1554년 5월 8일 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 베넷 그라스c후르치 위스 스트 리나르드 이스트체아프에서 Elizabeth Whetman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1584년 7월 8일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 쇼레딧치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Brooke nasceu aproximadamente 1531, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Brooke, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Katheryn Brooke, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Whetman em 8 de maio de 1554, em London St Benet Gracechurch with St Leonard Eastcheap, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 8 de julho de 1584, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Shoreditch, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Leonard Eastcheap, London, England: лондон ст бинет греисечурч вит ст леонард эасчип, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Brooke родился около 1531 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Brooke было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Katheryn Brooke, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Whetman 8 мая 1554 г. в местности лондон ст бинет греисечурч вит ст леонард эасчип, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер перед 8 июля 1584 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности шауредич, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
